title.en: Photoswitchable FPs — Toggle Fluorescence with Light

subtitle.en: PA-GFP and Dronpa toggle between dark and bright states with specific wavelengths — used for super-resolution PALM and pulse-chase live-cell imaging
subtitle.ko: PA-GFP·Dronpa가 특정 파장으로 dark↔bright 토글 — PALM 초해상도와 live-cell 펄스-체이스

description.en: Toggle Dronpa state dark/bright. Single-molecule on/off switching is the basis of PALM super-resolution.
description.ko: Dronpa 상태 토글. 단일분자 on/off가 PALM 초해상도 기반.
